hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"AUTO-REMINDER (project hook): 1) Ambiguous request, or the thing named does not match current code state -> STOP and ask the user before acting. 2) Before removing any column/feature -> Grep every occurrence of its name; after removing -> Grep again to confirm zero live references. 3) After every edit -> Read the affected section back before claiming done; never report success without verifying. 4) Any pg28 table change -> re-verify the finalized styling spec in CLAUDE.md Lessons Learned still renders. 5) After committing -> push to BOTH the feature branch AND main."}}'
